SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation

Interface IAutomationHub

All Known Implementing Classes:
AutomationHub
public interface IAutomationHub
Interface for the Smart Home Automation Hub.

The Automation Hub is responsible for storing user-defined automation rules and reacting to input device events. When an event arrives on the EVENT topic, the hub evaluates it against all active rules and publishes any matching commands back to the COMMAND topic on the message bus.

Per the system design, the Automation Hub is likely implemented as a thread within the coordinator process rather than a fully separate node, but it is defined as an interface here to allow independent testing and potential extraction later.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addRule(AutomationRule rule)
    Adds a new automation rule.
    List<AutomationRule>
    getAllRules()
    Returns all automation rules currently managed by this hub, including both active and inactive rules.
    void
    handleEvent(DeviceEvent event)
    Processes an incoming event from an input device.
    void
    removeRule(String ruleId)
    Removes an existing automation rule by its ID.
    void
    setRuleActive(String ruleId, boolean active)
    Enables or disables an existing rule without removing it.
    void
    start()
    Starts the Automation Hub: registers with the message bus and subscribes to the EVENT topic to begin receiving input device events.
    void
    stop()
    Stops the Automation Hub and unsubscribes from all message bus topics.

  • Method Details

    • start

      void start()
      Starts the Automation Hub: registers with the message bus and subscribes to the EVENT topic to begin receiving input device events.

    • stop

      void stop()
      Stops the Automation Hub and unsubscribes from all message bus topics.

    • addRule

      void addRule(AutomationRule rule)
      Adds a new automation rule. The rule becomes active immediately and will be evaluated against all subsequent events.
      Parameters:
      rule - the rule to add
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if a rule with the same ID already exists

    • removeRule

      void removeRule(String ruleId)
      Removes an existing automation rule by its ID. Has no effect if no rule with the given ID exists.
      Parameters:
      ruleId - the ID of the rule to remove

    • setRuleActive

      void setRuleActive(String ruleId, boolean active)
      Enables or disables an existing rule without removing it.
      Parameters:
      ruleId - the ID of the rule to update
      active - true to activate the rule, false to deactivate it
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no rule with the given ID exists

    • getAllRules

      List<AutomationRule> getAllRules()
      Returns all automation rules currently managed by this hub, including both active and inactive rules.
      Returns:
      list of all AutomationRule instances

    • handleEvent

      void handleEvent(DeviceEvent event)
      Processes an incoming event from an input device.

      Called by the hub's EVENT topic subscription handler each time a DeviceEvent arrives on the message bus. The hub evaluates all active rules against the event and, for each match, publishes a command to the COMMAND topic.

      Parameters:
      event - the event received from an input device
